cards.back: A variant of Gradient Descent that uses a randomly sampled subset of training data at each iteration.
A variant of Gradient Descent that uses a small batch of training data at each iteration.
A technique used in SGD to improve convergence by adding a fraction of the previous update to the current update.
A variant of SGD that uses a different acceleration term to improve convergence.
A popular optimization algorithm that adapts the learning rate for each parameter based on the magnitude of the gradient.
